tables: UPSRTC Azamgarh, Mau, Ballia उत्तर प्रदेश राज्य सड़क परिवहन निगम Conductor Meerut Outsourcing Recruitment Online Form 2026

Uttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation (UPSRTC) has released the advertisement of UP Bus Conductor Recruitment Notification 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested with Uttar Pradesh Bus Conductor Azamgarh, Mau, Ballia District Can Apply Online 20/07/2026 to 05/08/2026 . For other information related to Uttar Pradesh UPSRTC New recruitment like age limit, qualification, pay scale, District Wise Vacancy, and all other information read the advertisement and then apply.

Important Dates Application Begin : 20/07/2026 Last Date for Apply : 05/08/2026 Interview Date : As per Schedule
Application Fees General / OBC / EWS : 0 /- SC / ST : 0 /- No Application Fee for the All Candidates.

UPSRTC Azamgarh, Mau, Ballia Conductor Notification 2026 : Age Limit Details Minimum Age : 18 Years Minimum Age  : 45 Years Age Relaxation as per उत्तर प्रदेश राज्य सड़क परिवहन निगम Azamgarh, Mau, Ballia UPSRTC Conductor Outsourcing Recruitment 2026 Rules.
UPSRTC Conductor Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 35 Post
Passed Class 12th (Intermediate) from any recognized board in Indian. Candidate must be medically fit. No experience required. CCC Exam Passed.

How to Fill UPSRTC Conductor Outsourcing Jobs Online Form 2026 Conductor recruitment in Uttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation, which is being done this time through outsourcing. Candidates who are eligible and interested in UPSRTC Azamgarh, Mau, Ballia Conductor Recruitment will have to apply through Uttar Pradesh Sevayojan Portal (Rojgar Sangam). After registering in Uttar Pradesh Sevayojan Portal (Rojgar Sangam) and updating their qualification as well as CCC information in the profile, the candidate will get the option of Apply Job in UPSRTC Conductor Recruitment, read the information and apply. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
